software_development.name: Subham Soni
software_development.quote: Working at a top product company had been on my to-do list for a long time. My journey at Scaler helped me build the confidence and preparation to finally make that move.

software_development.name: Rishi Prakash
software_development.quote: I used to think top companies were only for students from elite colleges. With consistent preparation and the right mentorship, that belief changed completely.

software_development.name: Abinay Bingumalla
software_development.quote: I had seen a gap between what we study and what product teams expect. Scaler helped bridge that gap with a practical, interview-focused learning path.

software_development.name: Bhaskar Shaw
software_development.quote: One of the best decisions I made was investing in myself. The structure and accountability at Scaler turned that investment into clear career outcomes.

data_science.name: Rohit Kamra
data_science.quote: To do well in Data Science, effort and consistency matter more than anything. Scaler gave me the right roadmap and practical depth to break through.

data_science.name: Arjun Bhasin
data_science.quote: Being strong across multiple skills gave me an edge. Scaler helped me sharpen that edge and turn it into better opportunities.

data_science.name: Akshat
data_science.quote: From fundamentals to advanced ML, the learning path was clear. I cracked my first placement just a few months after joining the program.

devops.name: Deepak Mulakala
devops.quote: The transition into a stronger DevOps role became realistic once I followed a structured preparation plan and kept building consistently.

devops.name: Biswaranjan Adhikary
devops.quote: The journey taught me that disciplined upskilling compounds quickly. Mentorship and practice made the jump to a stronger product role possible.

ai_ml.name: Akshat
ai_ml.quote: Scaler gave me a structured AI/ML path from basics to practical depth. That helped me convert preparation into real placement outcomes quickly.

ai_ml.name: Balasubramanian R
ai_ml.quote: A focused curriculum and consistent practice made it easier to move into roles that combine data engineering with applied machine learning.

default.name: Prakash Shukla
default.quote: Joining Scaler was one of my best career decisions. The learning and support helped me move into a stronger software engineering role.

default.name: Krishna Chaitanya
default.quote: I enrolled to stay current and keep learning. A few months later, that effort translated into a Software Engineer III role at Walmart.
